clips.filename: letting people to pass by on the zebra - benimaclet.mp4

clips.filename: (calm) city street, parked cars, buildings, sidewalk, bicycle - benimaclet.mp4

clips.filename: (calm) city street, parked cars, trees, sidewalk, bike rack, camera - benimaclet.mp4
clips.narrative_note: Reflection — cycling away. Final words about what people walk past without seeing. Ambient audio prominent.

notes: LO_QUE_NADIE_VE contemplative structure — 3 reveals across Benimaclet and Trinidad. All calm/slow mood clips. Ambient audio prominent throughout. Minimal narration with long silences between phrases.
